nasb.text: “I have heard the taunting of Moab And the revilings of the sons of Ammon, With which they have taunted My people And become arrogant against their territory.

esv.text: “I have heard the taunts of Moab and the revilings of the Ammonites, how they have taunted my people and made boasts against their territory.

cnv.text: 我聽見了摩押人的辱罵之言， 聽見了亞捫人的毀謗之語， 他們辱罵我的子民， 又自誇自大侵犯他們的境界。
